Input.string: Debuffs on you expire 100% faster Debuffs on you expire 20% faster +2 to maximum number of Sacred Wid a Movement Skill Recently
Input.name: customMods

Items.Item: Rarity: UNIQUE Warped Timepiece Turquoise Amulet Variant: Pre 3.11.0 Variant: Pre 3.19.0 Variant: Current Selected Variant: 3 LevelReq: 50 Implicits: 1 {tags:jewellery_attribute}{range:0.5}+(16-24) to Dexterity and Intelligence {tags:attack,speed}{variant:1}{range:0.5}(8-12)% increased Attack Speed {tags:attack,speed}{variant:2}{range:0.5}(10-15)% increased Attack Speed {tags:attack,speed}{variant:3}{range:0.5}(10-25)% increased Attack Speed {tags:caster,speed}{variant:1}{range:0.5}(8-12)% increased Cast Speed {tags:caster,speed}{variant:2}{range:0.5}(10-15)% increased Cast Speed {tags:caster,speed}{variant:3}{range:0.5}(10-25)% increased Cast Speed {tags:speed}{variant:1}12% increased Movement Speed {tags:speed}{variant:2,3}{range:0.5}(10-15)% increased Movement Speed {variant:1}{range:0.5}(8-12)% reduced Skill Effect Duration {variant:2}{range:0.5}(10-15)% reduced Skill Effect Duration {variant:3}{range:1}(10-20)% reduced Skill Effect Duration {tags:life,jewellery_defense}{variant:1,2}30% increased total Recovery per second from Life, Mana, or Energy Shield Leech {variant:3}Debuffs on you Expire 100% Faster

Rarity: UNIQUE Timeclasp Moonstone Ring Variant: Pre 2.6.0 Variant: Pre 3.17.0 Variant: Pre 3.19.0 Variant: Current Selected Variant: 4 LevelReq: 25 Implicits: 1 {tags:jewellery_defense}{range:0.5}+(15-25) to maximum Energy Shield {tags:attack,speed}{range:0.5}(10-15)% increased Attack Speed {tags:caster,speed}{variant:1}{range:0.5}(5-8)% increased Cast Speed {tags:caster,speed}{variant:2,3}{range:0.5}(5-10)% increased Cast Speed {tags:caster,speed}{variant:4}{range:0.5}(10-15)% increased Cast Speed {tags:jewellery_defense}{variant:1}{range:0.5}+(10-25) to maximum Energy Shield {tags:jewellery_defense}{variant:2}{range:0.5}+(15-25) to maximum Energy Shield {tags:jewellery_defense}{variant:3}{range:0.5}+(40-45) to maximum Energy Shield {tags:mana}{variant:1}15% reduced Mana Regeneration Rate {tags:mana}{variant:2,3}15% increased Mana Regeneration Rate {tags:caster}{variant:1}Temporal Chains has 30% reduced Effect on You {tags:caster}{variant:2}Temporal Chains has 50% reduced Effect on You {variant:3}{range:0.5}(-10-10)% increased Skill Effect Duration {variant:4}{range:0}(-20-20)% increased Skill Effect Duration {tags:resource,life}{variant:4}{range:0.5}(6-12)% of Damage Taken Recouped as Life {tags:resource,mana}{variant:4}{range:0.5}(6-12)% of Damage Taken Recouped as Mana {variant:3,4}Unaffected by Temporal Chains

Rarity: RARE Elemental Wand Imbued Wand Crafted: true Prefix: {range:0.5}LocalAddedFireDamage8 Prefix: {range:0.5}LocalAddedColdDamage8 Prefix: {range:0.5}LocalAddedLightningDamage8 Suffix: None Suffix: {range:0.5}LocalCriticalStrikeChance3 Suffix: {range:0.5}LocalCriticalMultiplier4 Quality: 20 Sockets: B-B-B LevelReq: 59 Implicits: 1 {tags:caster_damage,damage,caster}{range:0.5}(33-37)% increased Spell Damage Adds 70 to 130 Fire Damage Adds 64 to 117 Cold Damage Adds 12 to 213 Lightning Damage 22% increased Critical Strike Chance +27% to Global Critical Strike Multiplier

Rarity: UNIQUE Beacon of Madness Two-Toned Boots (Armour/Energy Shield) Armour: 174 ArmourBasePercentile: 1 Energy Shield: 36 EnergyShieldBasePercentile: 1 League: Delirium Variant: Two-Toned Boots (Armour/Evasion) Variant: Two-Toned Boots (Armour/Energy Shield) Variant: Two-Toned Boots (Evasion/Energy Shield) Selected Variant: 2 {variant:1}Two-Toned Boots (Armour/Evasion) {variant:2}Two-Toned Boots (Armour/Energy Shield) {variant:3}Two-Toned Boots (Evasion/Energy Shield) Quality: 20 Sockets: G-G-G-G LevelReq: 70 Implicits: 3 {variant:1}{range:0.5}+(8-12)% to Fire and Cold Resistances {variant:2}{range:0.5}+(8-12)% to Fire and Lightning Resistances {variant:3}{range:0.5}+(8-12)% to Cold and Lightning Resistances Grants Level 1 Embrace Madness Skill 30% increased Movement Speed {variant:1}{range:0.5}(150-300)% increased Armour and Evasion {variant:1}+15 to maximum Fortification while affected by Glorious Madness {variant:1}20% chance to deal Double Damage while affected by Glorious Madness {variant:2}{range:0.5}(20-40)% increased Effect of Non-Damaging Ailments {variant:2}You have Igniting, Chilling and Shocking Conflux while affected by Glorious Madness {variant:2}Immune to Elemental Ailments while affected by Glorious Madness {variant:3}{range:0.5}(20-40)% increased Chaos Damage {variant:3}Enemies you Kill while affected by Glorious Madness have a 40% chance to Explode, dealing a quarter of their Life as Chaos Damage {variant:3}All Damage inflicts Poison while affected by Glorious Madness

Rarity: RARE Jewel Cobalt Jewel Crafted: true Prefix: None Prefix: None Suffix: None Suffix: None Implicits: 1 {custom}Skills fire 2 additional Projectiles if you've used a Movement Skill Recently
